requirements: Provide a robust frame for the 3U CubeSat
Include deployable rail guide grooves for payload access
Support PC/104 stack for electronic boards
Ensure structural integrity under launch loads
Enable thermal management through the aluminum frame
Facilitate electrical connectivity through connectors and PCBs
Allow service access for maintenance and upgrades
